pane.title: Browser
pane.emptyDetail: This session has no browser yet. One opens automatically when Claude works on a web task.
pane.popoutPlaceholder: The browser view is open in the floating window.

state.agentDrivingHint: You are watching in read-only mode
state.handoffPending: Claude is asking you to take over
state.handoffPendingHint: Take over to continue, or let Claude keep going
state.userDrivingHint: Claude is paused while you drive
state.sessionLostDetail: The browser process crashed. Claude's next browser action rebuilds it automatically — or retry now.
state.idlePrompt: This browser has been idle. Close it to free its resources? Your login is preserved.
state.firstUseHint: First use may download browser components and take a few minutes.

action.clickToDrive: Click the view to control it
action.rememberSiteHint: Keep the login for this site in this workspace. New chat sessions will be signed in automatically. Manage remembered sites in Settings → Security.
action.closeBrowserHint: Close the browser and free its resources. Your login is preserved for the next time you open one.
